# WOS Notification Template Sidecar v1.0 (LLM Reference)

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-spec-artifacts.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

Source spec: `wos-spec/specs/sidecars/notification-template.md`
Source schema: `wos-spec/schemas/sidecars/wos-notification-template.schema.json`

## Bottom Line Up Front

_No BLUF configured._

## Critical Schema Fields

| Pointer | Required | Type | Guidance | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `#/$defs/NotificationTemplate/properties/category` | yes | string | Classifies the template by governance event type to enforce category-specific requirements | Template category. Determines which governance mechanism uses this template. 'adverse-decision': adverse decision notice (Governance S3.1-S3.2). 'hold-notification': hold notice (Governance S12.2). 'appeal-acknowledgment': appeal receipt confirmation (Governance S3.5). 'sla-warning': SLA deadline warning (Governance S10.3). 'case-status-update': general case status notification. 'resume-notification': notice that a case resumed from hold (Governance S12.3). |
| `#/$defs/NotificationTemplate/properties/sections` | yes | array | Ordered sections that compose the notification -- adverse-decision templates must include due process required sections | Ordered content sections composing the notification body. For 'adverse-decision' templates, sections MUST address: specific determination, individualized reason codes, appeal rights and filing deadline, and appeal instructions (Notification Template S4.4). |
| `#/$defs/TemplateSection/properties/contentType` | yes | string | Classifies the section content for rendering and validation of due process requirements | Type of content in this section. 'text': free-text with optional placeholders. 'structured': structured content with labeled fields. 'appeal-rights': standardized appeal rights block (must include filing deadline, review body, continuation status). 'action-required': describes actions the recipient must take. 'contact-information': contact details for questions. |
| `#/properties/$wosNotificationTemplate` | yes | string | Document type marker for WOS Notification Template Config sidecar | WOS Notification Template specification version. MUST be '1.0'. Identifies this document as a WOS Notification Template Config sidecar and pins the specification version. Processors reject documents with unsupported versions. |
| `#/properties/targetWorkflow` | yes | string | Binds this sidecar to its parent kernel workflow | URI of the WOS Kernel Document this notification template config applies to. The processor resolves notificationTemplateKey and noticeTemplateKey lookups against the template collection in this sidecar when the kernel URI matches (Governance S12.2, S3.1). |
| `#/properties/templates` | yes | object | Named templates that governance mechanisms resolve via notificationTemplateKey and noticeTemplateKey | Named notification templates. Template keys are the identifiers referenced by notificationTemplateKey (Governance S12.2) and noticeTemplateKey (Governance S3.1) in governance documents. |

## Behavioral Essentials

- Define standardized notice templates for human and agent communication triggered by lifecycle events.
- Support multi-channel content (subject, body, SMS text) and attachments bound to specific notification types.
- Declare FEL-based variable requirements for template interpolation to ensure data availability at notice-generation time.
- Track notification delivery status and receipt in the provenance record for due process verification.

## Conformance Essentials

- A conforming notification template document must include $wosNotificationTemplate=1.0 and at least one template.
- Templates SHOULD declare an audience hint (human, agent, internal) to guide presentation and tone.
- Processors should warn if required FEL variables are missing from the case state when a notice is enqueued.
